workflow.name: Create hours-long wave music videos with Suno, ffmpeg-api and YouTube
workflow.description:
# Overview

This workflow automatically creates **hours-long wave music videos** by combining AI-generated music from **Suno** with a background video, fully automated using **n8n** and **ffmpeg-api**.

It connects music prompt generation, AI song creation, audio aggregation, video merging, and YouTube publishing into a single end-to-end automation. Once configured, the workflow runs continuously with no manual editing required.

This workflow is built for creators producing lo-fi, wave, ambient, or long-play music content who want a reliable and scalable way to generate long-form videos automatically.

---

# What can this workflow do?

- Collect music themes, background video URLs, and track counts via an input form  
- Generate multiple AI music tracks using Suno  
- Automatically check rendering status and retrieve completed songs  
- Concatenate multiple tracks into a single long-form audio file  
- Merge the final audio with a background video using ffmpeg-api  
- Upload the completed video to YouTube automatically  
- Generate SEO-optimized titles and descriptions using an AI model  

This workflow reduces manual work while keeping the entire music video production process structured and repeatable.

---

# How it works

You start by submitting a **music theme**, a **background video URL**, and the **number of music tracks** through an n8n form. The workflow initializes a working directory using ffmpeg-api to manage all audio and video assets.

An AI agent converts the music theme into structured Suno prompts. Suno then generates multiple music tracks, and the workflow continuously checks their rendering status until all songs are ready.

Once completed, the songs are downloaded, uploaded to ffmpeg-api storage, and concatenated into a single long-form audio track. This audio is merged with the background video to create the final hours-long wave music video.

Finally, the completed video is uploaded to YouTube. An AI model generates SEO-friendly metadata, and the video is published automatically without manual intervention.

---

# Setup steps

1. Connect an AI model (Gemini) for music prompt generation and YouTube metadata creation  
2. Configure Suno API access for AI music generation  
3. Set up ffmpeg-api for directory creation, file uploads, audio concatenation, and video merging  
4. Connect your YouTube account for automated uploads  
5. Review and customize the input form fields if needed  

After setup, the workflow runs end to end automatically.

---

# Documentation

For a full walkthrough and advanced customization ideas, watch the detailed tutorial on [YouTube](https://youtu.be/RBoLAgaWzFo?si=MqFcTTRWSb5AEOjr).

parameters.content:
## Input Data & Directory Initialization
Collect user input from the form and initialize a working directory using ffmpeg-api. This directory will be used to store videos, audio files, and intermediate assets throughout the workflow

## Download Background Video
Generate a storage path, download the background video from the provided URL, upload it to ffmpeg-api storage, and retrieve the processed video reference for later merging.

## AI Music Generation (Suno)
Use an AI agent to convert the user’s music theme into structured Suno prompts, generate multiple songs, poll for completion, and log song metadata for downstream processing.

## Download Songs & Merge Audio + Video
Download generated songs, upload them to ffmpeg-api storage, concatenate multiple tracks into a long-form audio file, and merge the final audio with the background video

parameters.formDescription: Provide music details for the background video

options.systemMessage:
=ROLE:
You are an expert music prompt engineer.

Your task is to carefully read the reference music prompt provided by the user and use it as the core inspiration to generate multiple song prompts.
Do NOT change, reinterpret, or override the user’s instructions.
Always honor User Instructions as the highest priority.

---

TASK:
Generate a JSON array containing exactly 5 song prompt objects.

Each object represents ONE unique song prompt inspired by the reference music prompt.

---

RULES:
- Always generate EXACTLY 5 songs.
- Number the songs sequentially from 1 to 5.
- Each song prompt must be unique while staying consistent with the reference music style, mood, and genre.
- Do NOT include explanations, markdown, comments, or any text outside the JSON array.

---

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Return ONLY valid JSON in the following structure:

[
  {
    "song": 1,
    "song_prompt": "detailed music prompt here"
  },
  {
    "song": 2,
    "song_prompt": "detailed music prompt here"
  },
  {
    "song": 3,
    "song_prompt": "detailed music prompt here"
  },
  {
    "song": 4,
    "song_prompt": "detailed music prompt here"
  },
  {
    "song": 5,
    "song_prompt": "detailed music prompt here"
  }
]

=You are a YouTube Content Optimization Agent.

Your task is to transform ONE winning video title into a complete content package.

INPUT:
- One “winning title” provided by the user.

OUTPUT:
Generate EXACTLY 3 sections in the following order:

––––––––––––––
1. OPTIMIZED TITLE
––––––––––––––
- Rewrite the input title to be clearer, stronger, and more clickable
- Under 70 characters
- Focus on ONE main benefit or outcome
- Simple, natural
- Optimized for YouTube SEO

––––––––––––––
2. VIDEO DESCRIPTION
––––––––––––––
- 3–5 short paragraphs
- First 2 lines must strongly hook the viewer
- Clearly explain:
  • The problem being solved
  • Who the video is for
  • What result the viewer will get
- Natural keyword usage
- No emojis
- Do NOT include hashtags inside the description

––––––––––––––
3. HASHTAGS
––––––––––––––
- 10–15 hashtags
- Each hashtag MUST start with #
- All lowercase
- Separated ONLY by semicolons (;)
- Optimized for YouTube search and Shorts discovery

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Do NOT add explanations or notes
- Do NOT repeat sentences across sections
- Output ONLY the 3 sections
- Write in Vietnamese

parameters.content:
# 🛠️ Workflow Setup Guide

Author: [GiangxAI](https://www.youtube.com/@giangxai.official)

## How it works 
- Music themes, background video URLs, and track counts are submitted via an input form  
- A working directory is created using ffmpeg-api to manage all assets  
- An AI agent generates structured Suno music prompts from the theme  
- Suno creates multiple music tracks and the workflow waits for completion  
- All tracks are concatenated into a long-form audio file  
- The final audio is merged with the background video using ffmpeg-api  
- The completed video is uploaded and published to YouTube automatically  

The entire workflow runs end to end without manual editing or intervention once configured.

---

## Setup guide [n8n](https://n8n.partnerlinks.io/giangxai)
- Connect an AI model (Gemini) for music prompt generation and SEO metadata  
- Add Suno API credentials for AI music generation by  [Kie ai](https://kie.ai?ref=f8cec88ea15f9ecbff52ccbafa41dd6e).
- Configure ffmpeg-api for path creation, file uploads, audio concatenation, and video merging  [FFmpeg-API](https://ffmpeg-api.com)
- Connect your YouTube account for automated uploads  by [Blotato](https://blotato.com/?ref=giang9s)
- Review and customize the input form fields if needed  

Setup is straightforward and does not require video editing or coding experience.

user.name: giangxai
user.bio: I create automated workflows that help people work smarter, move faster, and scale with ease.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
